C:\Python313\Lib\site-packages\cmake\data\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\_bindings.dir/objects.a
C:\PROGRA~1\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\_bindings.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\_bindings.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\PROGRA~1\mingw64\bin\G__~1.EXE -g -shared -o _bindings.cp313-win_amd64.pyd -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\_bindings.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\_bindings.dir\linkLibs.rsp
